transcription.text: hear that that's a mountain laughing at you so come prepared in a kia sportage with available all-wheel drive 237 horsepower and 260 pound feet of torque and not in the less torque and horsepower equipped honda cr-v touring so you can turn that mountain's laugh into a whimper get zero percent apr for 75 months on the 2021 sportage or lease an lx for 159 a month
